text:
Fun game. Deserves to be 1-1 at least, but the keepers have been on point, too.

Díaz getting completely suppressed by Cancelo and Neves. Yes, this leaves some free space for the rest of the Colombian attack to operate, but the lack of a right winger (or a Muñoz) means we're struggling to take advantage.

Portugal's attackers are really struggling with the Colombian CBs and DMFs. Their best chances have come from exploiting the back of our fullbacks (a known weakness). Having the more defensive Arias and Machado has helped out a bit, but it's still an ongoing threat.
label: hot_take

text:
We went from all WC games being free on national television, to having to pay to watch ALL of them, and still having a fucking ad break in the middle of both halves.

Here in Germany, yeah you can pay ONLY 11 euros to watch ALL world cup games. It sounds great, but you are still paying to watch ads when we didn't need to watch them in literally any other tournament.

So boo all you fucking want, the match-going fans are paying even more money than us watching at home, and we beg you to boo this shit
